heading: References
label: 410kkk–3 References
text: Any reference in any law (other than this subchapter), regulation, document, record, map or other paper of the United States to “Fort Clatsop National Memorial” shall be considered a reference to the “Lewis and Clark National Historical Park”.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 108–387118 Stat. 2234section 410kkk of this titleOct. 30, 2004
